scripts.test:e2e:build:bal: NEXT_PUBLIC_PROJECT_ID=balancer start-server-and-test 'cd ../../ && pnpm start --filter frontend-v3' 'http://localhost:3000' 'pnpm exec playwright test tests/build/balancer'
scripts.test:e2e:build:ui:bal: NEXT_PUBLIC_PROJECT_ID=balancer pnpm exec playwright test tests/build/balancer --ui
scripts.test:e2e:build:beets: NEXT_PUBLIC_PROJECT_ID=beets start-server-and-test 'cd ../../ && pnpm start --filter beets-frontend-v3' 'http://localhost:3001' 'pnpm exec playwright test tests/build/beets'
scripts.test:e2e:build:ui:beets: NEXT_PUBLIC_PROJECT_ID=beets pnpm exec playwright test tests/build/beets --ui
scripts.test:e2e:build:analytics: start-server-and-test 'cd ../../ && pnpm start --filter balancer-analytics' 'http://localhost:3002' 'pnpm exec playwright test tests/build/analytics'
scripts.test:e2e:dev:bal: NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_DEV=1 start-server-and-test 'cd ../../ &&  pnpm start --filter frontend-v3' 'http://localhost:3000' 'pnpm exec playwright test tests/dev/balancer'
scripts.test:e2e:dev:ui:bal: NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_DEV=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/dev/balancer --ui
scripts.test:e2e:dev:beets: NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_DEV=1 start-server-and-test 'cd ../../ &&  pnpm start --filter beets-frontend-v3' 'http://localhost:3001' 'pnpm exec playwright test tests/dev/beets'
scripts.test:e2e:dev:ui:beets: NEXT_PUBLIC_E2E_DEV=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/dev/beets --ui
